description: Health and Food Safety Inspector — conducts food establishment inspections, validates temperature controls, sanitation, and FDA Food Code compliance

hard_stops.label: Imminent Health Hazard
hard_stops.logic: Imminent health hazard observed (sewage backup, no hot water, rodent infestation, foodborne illness outbreak) — immediate closure per FDA Food Code 8-404.11

hard_stops.label: Critical Temperature Violation
hard_stops.logic: Food held in the temperature danger zone (41-135F) beyond safe time limits — critical food safety violation

hard_stops.label: No Certified Food Manager on Staff
hard_stops.logic: Establishment does not have a certified food protection manager as required by FDA Food Code 2-102.12

soft_flags.label: Score Below Satisfactory Threshold
soft_flags.logic: Inspection score is below the satisfactory threshold — establishment should receive follow-up inspection within 30 days

soft_flags.label: Repeat Violation
soft_flags.logic: Same violation category was cited in the previous inspection — pattern of non-compliance
